Title: Platform Foundation
Description: Runnable Olares stack: PostgreSQL, MinIO, Redis, Ollama, ComfyUI, API skeleton, health checks.
Acceptance Criteria: Docker Compose starts all services with one command. /health returns OK. ComfyUI test image succeeds. Ollama responds locally with zero egress.

Title: Pipeline Orchestration
Description: Temporal workflow skeleton with start, status, approve/reject signals, audit events.
Acceptance Criteria: User starts pipeline and sees status transitions. Workflow pauses at review gates. Approve advances; reject keeps stage. All transitions in audit_events.

Title: Idea, Story & Script Stages
Description: Idea capture through approved script using Story Architect and Screenwriter agents.
Acceptance Criteria: Creator completes Idea to approved Story to approved Script in one run. Assets versioned in MinIO. Agent invocations logged with model ID.

Title: Storyboard Stage
Description: ComfyUI storyboard frames from approved script, gallery review, approval.
Acceptance Criteria: 4-6 frames generated locally. Gallery review with approve/reject/regenerate. GPU jobs sequenced without OOM.

Title: Video & Pipeline Completion
Description: Short video generation, approval, export bundle, lineage summary.
Acceptance Criteria: 15-30s video generated locally. Full pipeline end-to-end per demo script. Export ZIP with manifest.

Title: Governance, Assets & Console
Description: Asset history, audit log, auth token, navigation shell, durability.
Acceptance Criteria: All assets versioned and browsable. Full audit trail visible. Pipeline survives worker restart. API token auth on mutating endpoints.

Description: Default project on startup. F-01.

Title: Infrastructure Enabler
Description: Docker Compose, health, schema, MinIO, Ollama/ComfyUI smoke tests.

Title: Start Production Pipeline
Description: Start Temporal workflow after idea capture. F-03.

Description: Dashboard showing stage, progress, CTAs. F-16.

Title: AI Story Generation

Title: Story Review & Approval
Description: Read, edit, approve/reject story. F-05.

Title: AI Script Generation
Description: Screenwriter agent generates one-scene Fountain script. F-06.

Title: Script Review & Approval
Description: Preview script, approve/reject. F-07.

Title: AI Storyboard Generation
Description: Cinematography agent + ComfyUI frames. F-08.

Title: Storyboard Gallery Review
Description: Grid gallery, approve/reject frames. F-09.

Title: AI Short Video Generation
Description: ComfyUI image-to-video from frames. F-10.

Title: Video Preview & Approval
Description: In-browser video preview and final approval. F-11.

Title: Lineage Summary
Description: Idea to video chain visualization. F-14.

Title: Export Final Bundle
Description: ZIP download with manifest.json. F-15.

Title: Asset Version History
Description: Browse versions per stage. F-12.

Title: Audit Log Viewer
Description: Chronological pipeline event log. F-13.

Title: Create default project
Description: As a creator, I want a default project on startup so I can begin without setup.
Acceptance Criteria: Given fresh deployment, one project AIMPOS Spark Demo exists. GET /projects returns project with status ACTIVE. Pipeline runs list is empty.

Title: Deploy MVP stack on Olares
Description: As a platform engineer, I want Docker Compose for all MVP services.
Acceptance Criteria: docker compose up brings 9 containers healthy within 5 min. /health returns 200. MinIO upload/download round-trip works. All services on aimpos-spark network.

Title: API health and logging
Description: As a platform engineer, I want health checks and structured logs.
Acceptance Criteria: GET /health includes postgresql, minio, redis, temporal status. Structured JSON logs with request_id. Failed dependency returns 503.

Title: Database schema foundation
Description: As a backend developer, I want core tables migrated.
Acceptance Criteria: Tables: projects, pipeline_runs, asset_versions, approvals, audit_events, lineage_edges. Rollback works on empty DB. asset_versions has stage, version, minio_key, content_hash, is_ai_generated.

Title: MinIO asset upload service
Description: As a backend developer, I want reusable content-addressable asset storage.
Acceptance Criteria: store_asset computes SHA-256 and stores at hash key. Metadata row content_hash matches ETag. Duplicate bytes deduplicated.

Title: Ollama and ComfyUI smoke test
Description: As an AI engineer, I want verified local model endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Ollama generate responds in <30s. ComfyUI workflow writes PNG to MinIO. Sequential GPU use without OOM.

Title: Start pipeline workflow
Description: As a creator, I want to start production after entering my idea.
Acceptance Criteria: POST /pipeline/start creates SparkPipelineWorkflow. GET /pipeline/status shows STORY_GENERATING or STORY_REVIEW. Duplicate start returns 409. PipelineStarted audit event recorded.

Title: Approve or reject stage output
Description: As a creator, I want to approve or reject AI output at each stage.
Acceptance Criteria: POST /pipeline/approve with GRANT creates immutable approvals row. Approve advances workflow. Reject with note keeps stage. ApprovalGranted audit event logged.

Title: Regenerate after rejection
Description: As a creator, I want to regenerate AI output after rejecting it.
Acceptance Criteria: POST /pipeline/regenerate triggers agent for current stage. New asset_version with incremented version. Max 3 regenerations per stage (429 after). Rejection note passed to agent.

Title: View pipeline status dashboard
Description: As a creator, I want a dashboard showing stage and progress.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard shows stage, status, 5-step progress. REVIEW shows Go to Review CTA. GENERATING polls every 5s. FAILED shows error and Retry.

Title: Enter production idea
Description: As a creator, I want to enter title, paragraph, and style note.
Acceptance Criteria: Submit idea stores idea.txt v1 in MinIO. Style note in metadata. Appears under stage IDEA. Validation on required fields and 50-2000 char paragraph.

Title: Generate story from idea
Description: As a creator, I want Story Architect to generate a treatment.
Acceptance Criteria: LangGraph Story Architect invoked. story.md on ai-draft branch. Audit logs model_id and agent. Local-only Ollama. Workflow to STORY_REVIEW.

Title: Review and edit story
Description: As a creator, I want to read, edit, and approve the story.
Acceptance Criteria: Review screen shows editable treatment. Save creates human-edit version. Approve advances pipeline. Reject enables regenerate.

Title: Generate one-scene script
Description: As a creator, I want Screenwriter to generate a Fountain script.
Acceptance Criteria: Exactly 1 scene Fountain script. script.fountain is_ai_generated=true. Lineage edge story to script. Workflow to SCRIPT_REVIEW.

Title: Review and approve script
Description: As a creator, I want to preview and approve the script.
Acceptance Criteria: Fountain rendered with formatting. Approve advances to STORYBOARD_GENERATING. Reject/regenerate works. Approved version marked in DB.

Title: Generate storyboard frames
Description: As a creator, I want 4-6 storyboard images from my script.
Acceptance Criteria: 4-6 PNG frames via ComfyUI. Ollama unloaded before GPU. Lineage script to frames. STORYBOARD_REVIEW on success. Retry 2x then FAILED.

Title: Review storyboard gallery
Description: As a creator, I want to view frames in a grid and approve or reject.
Acceptance Criteria: Responsive grid of 4-6 images. Lightbox preview. Approve-all advances to video. Reject triggers regenerate. AI badge on frames.

Title: Generate short video clip
Description: As a creator, I want a short video from approved frames.
Acceptance Criteria: scene_video.mp4 15-30s <=480p. Lineage frames to video. VIDEO_REVIEW on success. Slideshow fallback on failure.

Title: Preview and approve video
Description: As a creator, I want to preview video and complete the pipeline.
Acceptance Criteria: HTML5 player renders video. Approve sets COMPLETED. Reject enables regenerate. PipelineCompleted audit event.

Title: View asset lineage chain
Description: As a creator, I want to see idea to video lineage.
Acceptance Criteria: Ordered chain: idea to story to script to frames to video. Click node shows metadata. Data from lineage_edges PostgreSQL.

Title: Download production bundle
Description: As a creator, I want ZIP of approved assets with manifest.
Acceptance Criteria: ZIP contains all approved assets and manifest.json with hashes, approvals, model IDs. BundleExported audit event.

Title: Browse asset versions
Description: As a creator, I want to see all versions per stage.
Acceptance Criteria: Versions grouped by stage. Newest first. Preview or download per version. Shows is_ai_generated, branch, content_hash.

Title: View audit trail
Description: As a creator, I want chronological pipeline event log.
Acceptance Criteria: Events: PipelineStarted, AgentTaskCompleted, ApprovalGranted, Rejected, Completed. Agent events show model_id. Append-only. Included in export.

Title: Pipeline survives worker restart
Description: As a platform engineer, I want workflow resume after restart.
Acceptance Criteria: Worker restart resumes within 2 min. Approve signal works after API restart. No duplicate asset versions.

Title: API token authentication
Description: As a platform engineer, I want Bearer token on mutating endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: No token on POST returns 401. Valid Bearer succeeds. Web client sends token from env.

Title: App navigation shell
Description: As a creator, I want nav between Dashboard, Review, Assets, Audit, Export.
Acceptance Criteria: Nav bar on all screens. Empty states when pipeline not started. CTA reflects current stage. Usable at >=768px.

Title: MVP demo acceptance validation
Description: As a product owner, I want demo script executable end-to-end.
Acceptance Criteria: All 10 demo steps pass. SC-01 to SC-08 verified. Limitations documented. Stakeholder sign-off.
